findings.description: The source SQL comment explains that the example SQL is constructed because it combines variable conditions (可変条件と組み合わせているため), and that without variable conditions the SQL would be `USER_MTR.KENGEN_KBN IN (?, ?)` instead. The knowledge file presents the SQL without clarifying that it is the variable-condition variant, and omits the contrast with the non-variable-condition form. This distinction helps readers understand what the generated SQL means and why it has the `(0 = 1 OR (...))` wrapper.
findings.source_evidence:
-- 本SQL文は、可変条件と組み合わせているため、下記のSQL文が構築される。
-- 可変条件を使用しなかった場合、構築されるSQL文は「USER_MTR.KENGEN_KBN IN (?, ?)」となる。
